title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Koala Sleep Beds Ltd
body: "Application number 5289  Applicant Koala Sleep Pty. Ltd objected to the name used by Koala Sleep Beds Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Koala Sleep Beds Ltd is changed to 15889501, Ltd. "
